reviews.review_msg: Byron is a great professor, he really brings theories to life and explains them really well. You just have to be prepared to get a lot of information during lectures. It is a 400 level course and if you don't have a basic grasp on fundamental communication theories at this point then of course you'll find it difficult. But otherwise, it's fun :)

Professor Hauck is the most amazing prof in CMNS! I would love to take another with him. The workload is quite low, if you pay attention in class and do your readings you will receive a excellent grade.
